name: SLINKsol
description: ShareLink ($SLINK) is a fair-launched community token on Solana providing retail-accessible narrative exposure to the institutional RWA tokenization thesis anchored by Securitize — the leading compliant tokenization platform powering BlackRock's BUIDL fund, Morgan Stanley initiatives, and major institutional asset digitization. Founded by an early Securitize seed investor (2018), SLINK aligns community conviction with real equity commitment: 15,000 Securitize shares held by the founder establish a tangible fair-value benchmark. With 2% of supply permanently burned via creator-fee buyback, 50% founder-locked for six months on-chain, and zero presale allocation, SLINK offers transparent, community-first positioning ahead of anticipated Securitize public market catalysts.
